definition.name: CPU Contention Monitor - Mainframe LPAR {{host.name}}  CPU contention exceeds recommended threshold
definition.message:
This monitor evaluates the WatchTower z/IRIS CPU Metric `zos.cpu.in_ready_work_queue_contention` exceeds 60% which indicates CPU contention on z/OS LPARs.
 
CPU contention exceeded the 60% on {{host.name}} . Application availability may be impacted. 

Next Steps:
1. Engage Mainframe SMEs to address resource contention
